biography:
Everyone has a story to tell.
#ShotoniPhone

latestIgtvVideos.caption:
Commissioned by Apple. “We wanted to push the #iPhone12Pro with its Dolby Vision and low-light recording capabilities to the limit.”

#ShotoniPhone 12 Pro by Donghoon J. and James T. of @InciteDesign. 

Music: “RADIANCE” by LORN. 

Head to Stories to see how it was made.
latestIgtvVideos.title: Experiments V: Dark Universe

latestIgtvVideos.caption: “The unfinished work of racial justice and equality call us all to account. Things must change, and Apple's committed to being a force for that change. Today, I'm proud to announce Apple’s Racial Equity and Justice Initiative, with a $100 million commitment.” Tim Cook
latestIgtvVideos.title: Apple is taking action to fight systemic racism.

latestIgtvVideos.caption:
Shawn Theodore is a photographer who has been working to preserve the culture of local neighborhoods that are disappearing fast due to gentrification.
Shawn explains his creative process and the drive to take visual archives from the mobile environment to within fine art institutions.
latestIgtvVideos.title: Mobile to Museum

latestIgtvVideos.caption: Photographer Christy Lee Rogers shoots under water to create photographic works that push the possibilities of movement, color and light.
latestIgtvVideos.title: Water + Light

latestIgtvVideos.caption:
Commissioned by Apple. Gaucha, the female gauchos of Argentina command respect through their leadership and preservation of culture in their communities. This is the story of Julia Lamas. Shot on iPhone 11.

Directors: Martin Reigel and Marco Vernaschi.
latestIgtvVideos.title: Gaucha Del Jujuy

latestIgtvVideos.caption: Jim Golden is a pioneer of laydown photography. From clothing to analog equipment, Jim takes us through the process of balancing color and composition in his creations.
latestIgtvVideos.title: Laydown Photography

latestIgtvVideos.caption:
Photographer and Creative Director Adrienne Raquel has developed a distinctive style expressed through incredible use of color. Here, Adrienne shares her approach to color selection and the edit.

Shot on iPhone XS

Directors: Austin Rhodes and Ivan Landau.
latestIgtvVideos.title: Shooting Vibrant Color

latestIgtvVideos.caption:
Year after year, pilgrims from all over the world walk El Camino de Santiago motivated by many different reasons. 
For most of them, the process and who they become while walking, is more important than reaching Santiago de Compostela.

Shot on iPhone XS Max.

Director: César Pesquera
Director of Photography: Sergi Iracheta
Music: Mans O
latestIgtvVideos.title: Along the Way

latestIgtvVideos.caption: Creative partners Kelsey McClellan and Michelle Maguire, aka Terrence Caviar, share a passion for bringing food to life in settings where they can play with color, texture and offbeat visual displays. The duo shares their creative process and approach to creating still life with food.
latestIgtvVideos.title: Still Life With Food

latestIgtvVideos.caption:
The Gay Rodeo is a safe space for the LGBTQIA community to connect over their love of Western culture by just being themselves. Whether they’re in drag, riding or just fans, everyone is family here.

Shot on iPhone XS and iPhone XS Max with the aid of:

DJI OSMO Mobile 2 Gimbal for iPhone
Moment lenses for iPhone

Photographer: @lukegilford
Bull Rider: Breana Knight
Song: “Monster of Meares” by @dearnorareality and "Nos Veremos” by @ylabamba
latestIgtvVideos.title: Call Me Cowboy

latestIgtvVideos.caption:
Alfie Templeman recorded his first track at 13 years old and produced and released his inaugural EP at 15. ‘Stop Thinking (About Me)’ is a new single from the Bedfordshire singer and multi-instrumentalist.

Shot on iPhone XS.
Director: KLVDR

Listen on Apple Music: https://apple.co/2UNoE7v
latestIgtvVideos.title: Alfie Templeman

latestIgtvVideos.caption:
Award-winning photographer and photojournalist Christopher Anderson is known for his magnetic portraiture. He strives for emotive and timely elements in his compositions. In this feature, Anderson shows us how to advance beyond technical precision to disrupt the portrait. 
To learn more, sign up for a Today at Apple Photo Lab with Christopher at apple.co/AndersonPhotoLab.

Shot on iPhone XS.

Directors: Austin Rhodes and Ivan Landau
latestIgtvVideos.title: Christopher Anderson

latestPosts.caption:
‘HVL,’ a 360º album trailer #ShotoniPhone17Pro by @lf.pvnirvana 

See how a rig of iPhones created an interactive trailer for @rpt.mckeyyyyy’s upcoming album.

 #HVL #MCK

Drawing outside the lines 🎨
#ShotoniPhone by Luciano C. @luccico
latestPosts.alt: A picture of a large white ferris wheel set against a vibrant blue sky. The photographer has added an illustration that turns the ferris wheel into the front wheel of a large illustrated bike.

childPosts.alt: A picture of a large white ferris wheel set against a vibrant blue sky. The photographer has added an illustration that turns the ferris wheel into the front wheel of a large illustrated bike.

An aerial image of a beach. The image is taken from far away so you can see the sprawling city, roads, and mountains. The photographer has added an illustration to the image, so it looks like a very large person is sweeping up the ocean with a broom.

An image of a fluffy white cloud set against a light blue sky. The photographer has added an illustration so it appears as though a boy is sitting on the ground with a string attached to the cloud like a kite.

latestPosts.caption: Kicking up dust. #ShotoniPhone by Rohit V. @rohit_apf
latestPosts.alt: A lone rider on horseback moves through a herd, silhouetted against a dusty, golden landscape at sunset.

childPosts.alt: A lone rider on horseback moves through a herd, silhouetted against a dusty, golden landscape at sunset.
A herd of horses in an open plain with kicked up dust beneath them as a dog corrals them together.
A group of horses stands close together as thick dust glows in warm light around their legs.
A large herd of horses emerges through swirling orange dust, with a rider faintly visible in the background.
A herd of horses runs across an open plain, kicking up dust beneath a golden sky with distant mountains.

latestPosts.caption:
A smashing success. #ShotoniPhone by @kaleeul 

“Slow motion allows me to study structural behavior after the fact, turning each build into both performance and research.” - Khalil J.

Music: ‘Rice & Beans’ by @frangiemusic

Behind the cake. #ShotoniPhone17Pro by @thejonnycakes 

“I love that baking is a science and that decorating is an art. And with hyper realistic cakes, I get to do both.” - Jonny M. 

Music: “Greenhouse (Instrumental)” by Rosay

A slice of history 🍰 Celebrating 50 years of Apple. #ShotoniPhone17Pro

Music: “Bounce Rate” by Matt Abeysekera

Look both ways. #ShotoniPhone by Sarah K. @its.sarahkhorbtli 

“We’re living in a moment that celebrates speed and constant output. Drawing each frame by hand slowed time down for me. It became therapeutic.” - Sarah K.

Music: ‘A Girl is a Drug’ by @parrisgoebel

Oontz oontz oontz. #ShotoniPhone17Pro by @animation_ben #ApplePartner

“I hope you feel inspired to let out your creativity, as silly or abstract as it may be!” - Ben M.

Music: ‘Critica Veintena’ by @bndofc

Zoom on the shroom. #ShotoniPhone17Pro by @rashid_bin__ 

“I work as an auto electrician mechanic, but photography has become something I love. I enjoy noticing small, ordinary things around me and capturing them in a way that feels special to me.” - Rashid B.
latestPosts.alt: A close-up view of clustered white mushrooms showing their smooth caps and tall stems against a bright blue background.

childPosts.alt: A close-up view of clustered white mushrooms showing their smooth caps and tall stems against a bright blue background.
An extreme close-up of a brown mushroom’s gills radiating from its center in tightly layered, wavy lines.
A macro shot of many small, round white mushrooms packed closely together, highlighting their soft, textured surfaces.

latestPosts.caption: “I’m a wanderer, constantly finding small pockets of Los Angeles that become my sets. I love using color, shape and light to bring clarity to the complex world around me.” #ShotoniPhone17Pro by Arielle BW. @ariellebobbwillis #ApplePartner
latestPosts.alt: A person with bright pink braids styled upwards whips their head forward wearing a teal dress over a purple long-sleeve top in front of a blue fence.

childPosts.alt: A person with bright pink braids styled upwards whips their head forward wearing a teal dress over a purple long-sleeve top in front of a blue fence.
A person whips bright pink braids around their head outdoors, wearing a sheer pale pink top over a long purple skirt and black shoes.

A person with bright pink braids appearing to float around their head with movement in dynamic, swirling loops stands against a white wall and tree trunk, wearing a teal outfit with purple sleeves and blue pants.
A woman with bright pink braids wears a blazer backwards, she faces away from the camera with her tucked into her jacket, framed by a two toned green door.

latestPosts.caption:
Peek-a-blue. #ShotoniPhone by @mrharter 

“I was hiking the Perito Moreno glacier when we went down to see the formations and craters inside the glacier. When I looked up, I saw one of the most beautiful shades of blue.” - Marco H.
latestPosts.alt: The view from inside a smooth, blue ice tunnel frames a snowy landscape and cloudy sky at the far opening.

childPosts.alt: The view from inside a smooth, blue ice tunnel frames a snowy landscape and cloudy sky at the far opening.
Two climbers ascend the inside of a deep blue ice shaft, looking up toward a circular opening of bright sky above.

latestPosts.caption:
Marine medley. #ShotoniPhone by @braiding.seagrass 

“There is such vibrant and abundant life in the Pacific Ocean that is often overlooked. I wanted to bring together different species found in time pools along the central California coast through collage.” - Calista K.
latestPosts.alt: A collage of brightly colored sea slugs and nudibranchs in shades of orange, yellow, and white arranged against a black background.

childPosts.alt: A collage of brightly colored sea slugs and nudibranchs in shades of orange, yellow, and white arranged against a black background.
An assortment of translucent marine animals including jellyfish, an octopus, and small sea stars displayed on a black background.
A collection of diverse sea cucumbers, nudibranchs, and other soft-bodied marine invertebrates in vivid orange, pink, green, and yellow colors set against black.
